/usr/lib/ccache/cc -std=c89 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/free-ld.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/free-ld.dir/src/ld/elf.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ld.dir/src/ld/reloc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ld.dir/src/ld/layout.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ld.dir/src/ld/dynamic.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ld.dir/src/ld/script.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ld.dir/src/cc/ir_serialize.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ld.dir/src/cc/lto.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ld.dir/src/cc/util.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ld.dir/src/ld/ld.c.o" -o free-ld
